# Feature: Engine follow-up gaps (#74/#75 hardening)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-08 -->

## Intent
Close remaining stabilization gaps after PR #108: embed machine-readable `fact.conflict` on conflicting facts, extend destructive key detection (`cancel`/`reset`), and add automated tests for unreachable runtime scans and `staleFactIds` in `confidence.json` after rescan.

Roadmap: Engine stabilization follow-up (Stufe A) — Documentation Intelligence Engine artifacts.

## Preconditions
- `main` includes confidence v2 artifact builder and runtime scan pipeline (PR #108)
- Playwright installed for runtime integration tests (skipped gracefully when missing)

## Happy Path
- [ ] Facts with `status: conflict` include optional `conflict: { status, reason, competingFacts, selectedFactId?, resolutionSource? }`
- [ ] `isDestructiveActionKey` matches `cancel` and `reset` substrings in fact keys
- [ ] `captureRuntimeSnapshots` against unreachable host returns warning without throwing
- [ ] After rescan marks approved facts stale, `confidence.json` lists their ids in `staleFactIds`

## Edge Cases
- [ ] `applyFactConfidencePolicies` preserves `fact.conflict` on conflict facts
- [ ] Resolved merges without conflict status do not require `fact.conflict`

## Regression
- [ ] Existing confidence engine v2 and runtime scan integration tests pass
- [ ] `pnpm run verify` passes

## Assumptions
- `fact.conflict` complements (does not replace) `confidence.json.conflicts[]`
- Unreachable runtime test uses `http://127.0.0.1:1` with no listener

## Implementation Notes
- `packages/core/src/types/fact.ts` — `FactConflict` type + optional `fact.conflict`
- `packages/core/src/confidence/conflict.ts` — `createFactConflict` helper
- `packages/core/src/graph/knowledge-graph.ts` — attach `conflict` on merge conflicts
- `packages/core/src/confidence/score.ts` — `cancel`/`reset` in destructive key regex
- `packages/core/schemas/facts.schema.json` — optional `conflict` on facts (v0.2.0)
- `packages/core/src/validators/fact.ts` — validate optional `conflict`
- Tests: `graph-confidence.test.ts`, `confidence-engine-v2.test.ts`, `artifact.test.ts`, `capture-runtime.integration.test.ts`, `version-history.test.ts`
